---
title: "current_research"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: flatly 
    highlight: tango
---

<div style="display: flex; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 30px;">

<img src="images/heart_puncture.jpg" style="width: 32%; border-radius: 10px; object-fit: cover;">
<img src="images/cardiocentesis.jpg" style="width: 32%; border-radius: 10px; object-fit: cover;">

</div>

## Projects

### Project 1: How temperature affect complement inhibition? 

**Overview:**  
Brief description of your project—what problem you're studying and why it matters.

**Methods:**  
- Flow cytometry  
- ELISA  
- In vivo infection models  

**Goal:**  
What you’re trying to discover or prove.

---

### Project 2: Complement Activation In Vivo

**Overview:**  
Short description of the project.

**Methods:**  
- Satellite data analysis  
- Machine learning models  

**Goal:**  
What impact this research could have.
